session_authority_role: creates and binds lawful session center
queue_dispatch_role: queues and dispatches bounded work within session
main_boundary_proved: session authority is not reporting and queue is not center

api_entry_role: binds external carrier into existing session
main_boundary_proved: API entry is attachment not center

queue_dispatch_role: defers bounded movement due to runtime prerequisites
main_boundary_proved: queue deferment is not activation authority

session_authority_role: re-establishes or persists lawful session center
main_boundary_proved: continuation and settlement do not replace session authority
